data.title: oOh!media Releases 2024 Full Year Results
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

oOh media Ltd ( (AU:OML) ) has issued an announcement.

oOh!media Limited has released its 2024 Full Year Results Presentation to the ASX, indicating its continued commitment to delivering value to its stakeholders. This announcement, authorized by the Chief Executive Officer, underscores the company’s strategic positioning in the Out of Home media industry, highlighting its expansive network and its role in connecting advertisers with diverse audiences across various public spaces in Australia and New Zealand.

More about oOh media Ltd

oOh!media is a leading Out of Home media company, focusing on enhancing public spaces through engaging environments. It provides advertisers, landlords, leaseholders, community organizations, local councils, and governments the opportunity to reach large and diverse audiences across Australia and New Zealand through its network of digital and static asset locations including roadsides, retail centers, airports, train stations, bus stops, office towers, and universities.

This update is significant for stakeholders as it clarifies financial details related to the six-month period ending on December 31, 2024, reflecting the company’s ongoing commitment to transparency and accurate financial reporting.

data.title: oOh!media Ltd Announces Dividend Distribution
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

oOh media Ltd ( (AU:OML) ) has issued an announcement.

oOh!media Ltd has announced a new dividend distribution of AUD 0.035 per ordinary fully paid share, with key dates being the ex-date on March 5, 2025, the record date on March 6, 2025, and the payment date on March 27, 2025. This distribution relates to the financial period ending December 31, 2024, and reflects the company’s commitment to providing returns to its shareholders, potentially enhancing its appeal and stability in the market.

More about oOh media Ltd

oOh!media Ltd is a company operating in the media and advertising industry, primarily offering out-of-home advertising solutions. The company focuses on delivering impactful advertising experiences through a wide portfolio of outdoor advertising assets.

data.title: Vection Technologies Secures $0.6M SaaS Deal in France
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Vection Technologies Ltd. ( (AU:VR1) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Vection Technologies Ltd has secured a three-year SaaS distribution agreement with Augmentalix in France valued at a minimum of $0.6 million. This partnership will expand Vection’s market reach in Central Europe and diversify its global presence by leveraging Augmentalix’s expertise in XR technologies. The collaboration is expected to strengthen Vection’s positioning in the AI and XR sectors while enhancing sales channels and market confidence in its solutions.

More about Vection Technologies Ltd.

Vection Technologies Ltd is an enterprise-focused company that specializes in bridging the physical and digital worlds through extended reality (XR) interfaces. They help organizations leverage 3D data to enhance collaboration, learning, and sales growth. Vection is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the ticker VR1 and trades on the U.S. OTC markets under the symbol VCTNY.

Evergreen Lithium Ltd. ( (AU:EG1) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Evergreen Lithium Ltd. announced the appointment of Steven John Morris as a new director, effective from February 24, 2025. The notice indicates that Morris currently does not hold any securities or interests in contracts related to the company, signaling a neutral start in his director role. This appointment may influence the company’s strategic direction and governance, impacting stakeholders and market perception.

More about Evergreen Lithium Ltd.

Evergreen Lithium Ltd. operates in the lithium industry, focusing on the development and production of lithium resources. The company is involved in the exploration and utilization of lithium, a key component in battery technology and renewable energy solutions.

data.title: Predictive Discovery Reports Promising Drilling Results at Bankan Gold Project
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Predictive Discovery Limited ( (AU:PDI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Predictive Discovery Limited announced promising drilling results from its Bankan Gold Project in Guinea, with particular focus on the Fouwagbe and Sounsoun targets. Recent drilling at these sites has revealed significant gold mineralization, especially in the underexplored south-western corridor of Sounsoun, which has been identified as a priority for further exploration. The company’s ongoing exploration efforts and geological modeling are aimed at advancing towards maiden Mineral Resource estimates, signaling potential growth and increased resource definition for stakeholders.

More about Predictive Discovery Limited

Predictive Discovery Limited is a company operating in the mining and exploration industry, focusing primarily on gold exploration projects. The company is strategically invested in the Bankan Gold Project in Guinea, where it aims to define and expand its mineral resources through systematic exploration and drilling.

data.title: Saipem and Subsea7 Announce Merger Plans to Form Saipem7
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Subsea 7 ( (GB:0OGK) ).

Saipem and Subsea7 have agreed on key terms for a potential merger, forming a new entity named Saipem7. This merger aims to create a global leader in energy services with a combined revenue of EUR 20 billion and significant synergies expected in the third year post-completion. The transaction is anticipated to enhance shareholder value, optimize capital investment, and expand the company’s global reach, with completion expected in the second half of 2026.

More about Subsea 7

Subsea7 operates in the energy services industry, specializing in offshore and onshore services, including drilling, engineering, construction, and decommissioning. The company focuses on providing comprehensive solutions for projects in oil, gas, carbon capture, and renewable energy markets across the globe.

data.title: Zeotech Signs Letter of Intent for AusPozz™ Project at Port of Bundaberg
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Zeotech Limited ( (AU:ZEO) ) has provided an update.

Zeotech Limited has executed a non-binding Letter of Intent with Gladstone Ports Corporation to potentially develop AusPozz™ manufacturing and bulk storage facilities at the Port of Bundaberg. This agreement provides a framework for assessing the suitability of the port facilities for Zeotech’s project, aligning with the company’s strategic positioning to access both domestic and international markets. The collaboration highlights the Port of Bundaberg’s strategic location, enhancing Zeotech’s operational capabilities and potential market reach.

More about Zeotech Limited

Zeotech Limited is an emerging mineral processing technology company focused on leveraging high-grade kaolin resources to produce advanced materials for greenhouse gas mitigation, including zeolites for methane control and high-reactivity metakaolin for the low-carbon concrete market.
